title: Healthy Brain Network EEG - Not for Commercial Use
description: The Healthy Brain Network EEG dataset comprises high-resolution electroencephalogram recordings and behavioral responses collected from child and adolescent participants as part of the larger Healthy Brain Network initiative. The dataset includes EEG data acquired during various experimental tasks, behavioral measures such as reaction times and accuracy, and derived psychological factors (P-Factor, attention, internalizing/externalizing behaviors) from questionnaires. All events are annotated using Hierarchical Event Descriptors (HED) to facilitate systematic meta- and mega-analyses of neural activity and behavior.
methods_description: EEG data were collected during various experimental tasks with concurrent behavioral response recording. Behavioral data originally recorded in the HBN behavior directory have been integrated into event files. Data underwent minimal quality control to verify integrity, task completeness, and preprocessing readiness.
